_contract_version.description: Audit column — semver of the Bronze ODCS contract under which this row was written (matches metadata.version). Lets Silver and the DQ Gate detect contract drift without re-reading the YAML.
_contract_version.title: Contract Version

_correlation_id.description: Audit column — UUID linking the row to the upload batch.
_correlation_id.title: Correlation Id

_dq_status.description: Audit column — DQ Gate verdict set by internal data lineage.
_dq_status.title: Dq Status

_ingested_at_utc.description: Audit column — UTC timestamp when the row landed in Bronze.
_ingested_at_utc.title: Ingested At Utc

_raw_blob_path.description: Audit column — full ABFSS / S3 / queue URI of the raw payload as it landed in the source landing zone. Used for forensic replay and Purview lineage back to the raw blob. Supersedes the older _source_file audit column (kept for backward compatibility with ADR-002 v1 consumers); new ingest notebooks MUST set both to the same value when the source is file-shaped.
_raw_blob_path.title: Raw Blob Path

_source_file.description: Audit column — source CSV filename or URI.
_source_file.title: Source File

_source_lane.description: Audit column — internal ingest lane that delivered this row.
_source_lane.title: Source Lane

category.description: Top-level ISMR occurrence category. Closed vocabulary per synth-rules table 7. Source CSV header "Category".
category.title: Category

count.description: Number of occurrences of this (category, type) in the reporting period. Realistic range 0–25. Source CSV header "Count".
count.title: Count

notes.description: Free-text notes from the operator. CARRIES HERO IDS — preserved verbatim from source and never regenerated by synthesis (see synth-rules table 7 invariants). Source CSV header "Notes".
notes.title: Notes

period.description: Reporting period the count covers. Source CSV header "Period".
period.title: Period

type.description: ISMR occurrence type within the category (e.g. "Critical occurrences", "ODD exceedances", "Cybersecurity issues"). Closed vocabulary of 19 values per synth-rules table 7; (category, type) pair preserved verbatim. Source CSV header "Type".
type.title: Type
